entries.title: myharness
entries.description: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six team patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation), a two-layer quality gate (internal QA + external codex/agy review), TDD/dev-rules doctrine injection, risk-tiered gates, and dual-runtime output (Claude Code + Codex). Claude Code·Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 에이전트 팀+스킬로 변환하고, 내부 QA + 외부 리뷰 2층 게이트와 듀얼 런타임을 적용하는 메타 스킬.

entries.title: code-quality-atlas
entries.description: A research-derived suite of 33 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entries.title: driftwave
entries.description: A look-before-you-act coding loop for Claude Code: check what's there, what's asked, and the gap — then do it and verify. Clusters artifacts with H₀ persistent homology (real); the higher 'sheaf'/'H₁' layers are topology-inspired LLM heuristics. Guided by five axioms: NO_AVERAGING, UPWARD_FLOW, WAYPOINT_ROUTING, SHAPE_OVER_COUNT, ADAPTIVE_SCALE.

Drive both from the Claude mobile app. No chat.db reading.

entries.title: larch
entries.description: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entries.description: Spec-driven development with a Verified Traceability Graph — every requirement bound to a passing check. EARS specs, evidence-bound done, drift detection, graph-derived PRs.

entries.description: IDC workflow (Think → Plan → Build → Recirculator, drained by Autorun) — a guardrail-framed, tracker-driven, goal-contract development pipeline as an installable Claude Code plugin

entries.title: oh-my-claudecode
entries.description: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entries.title: forge-state
entries.description: Lab bench for open-source projects. Inbound intake from Slack 🧪 reactions plus wild-source harvesters (GitHub code search, RSS feeds, curated author watchlist). Nightly, forge researches, clones, builds inside a sealed Docker sandbox, runs an experiment, packages it into something runnable, and ships a writeup + deployable artifact. Includes forge-introspector — reads its own capability walls across published experiments and proposes work orders to overcome them. Build failures are kept as findings, not discarded.

entries.title: agntux-jira
entries.description: Brings your Jira issues into AgntUX — comment, transition, assign, edit, or log time without leaving your workflow.

entries.title: agent-team
entries.description: A domain-agnostic agent-team scaffold built around the Planner → Generator → Evaluator loop. Reusable role agents (planner, generator, evaluator, design-evaluator, coordinator) and a reference end-to-end workflow with slash commands. Local-first; the same agents deploy headless to Claude Managed Agents via scripts/cma. Copy it and fill in your vertical.

entries.title: core
entries.description: Generic agent behavior (delivered via hooks), reusable skills, and the /setup project scaffolder.

entries.title: argus
entries.description: Greek-named permanent QA team. One entry point (odysseus) picks an engagement mode and fires parallel surface×mode lanes (UI / API / perf / security / a11y / DB-gated / white-box-gated) for black-box hunting plus regression automation. 23 sub-agents.

entries.title: agntux-canva
entries.description: Brings your Canva designs and comments into AgntUX so you see what needs your attention.

entries.title: vue-debug-guides
entries.description: Vue 3 debugging and error handling for runtime errors, warnings, async failures, and SSR/hydration issues. Use when diagnosing or fixing Vue issues.

entries.title: odoo-ai-skills
entries.description: A Claude Code skills suite for Odoo 17/18/19 development with an AI agent: read ground truth from the running instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entries.title: a-comm-skills
entries.description: A-Comm Claude Code skills — telemetry-stripped, de-branded pack of 24 skills for engineering, design review, and shipping workflows.

entries.title: agntux-dropbox
entries.description: Bring your Dropbox files into your AgntUX knowledge store, and act on them — share, organize, request — right from triage.

entries.title: tesserae-core
entries.description: Always-on portable engineering rules (universal + Python tiers). A SessionStart hook injects the bundled rule modules into every session and warns loudly when a required module is missing.

entries.title: interactive-mcp
entries.description: Mirrors the OpenCode interactive MCP setup for Claude Code with repo docs/libs and dependency-graph tools, skills, and rules.

entries.title: data
entries.description: Reusable data-engineering skills: ClickHouse/dbt query best practices.

entries.title: agntux-google-calendar
entries.description: Brings your Google Calendar into AgntUX with a daily look at the week ahead and everything you need to prepare.

entries.title: claude-status-bar-windows
entries.description: System-tray status indicator for Claude Code on Windows: animated icon, awaiting-permission dot, elapsed timer, and an always-on-top status pill.

entries.title: agntux-sentry
entries.description: Sentry issues and observability in your AgntUX knowledge store.

entries.title: agntux-google-drive
entries.description: Bring your Google Drive files into your AgntUX knowledge store.

entries.title: vue-router-best-practices
entries.description: Vue Router 4 patterns, navigation guards, route params, and route-component lifecycle interactions.

entries.title: scientific-literature
entries.description: Multi-source scientific literature search and ingestion: Europe PMC, PubMed, OpenAlex, bioRxiv/medRxiv, with optional semantic search via Voyage AI + Qdrant.

entries.title: discovery
entries.description: Product discovery skills — explore customer needs, map the opportunity space, brainstorm solutions, surface and test assumptions.

entries.title: agntux-apple-notes
entries.description: Bring Apple Notes into AgntUX with one-click actions to create and update notes.

entries.title: agntux-docusign
entries.description: DocuSign e-signature workflow in your AgntUX knowledge store.

entries.title: codex-verify
entries.description: Independent verification for Claude Code: send plans, code diffs, and skill-rule drafts to Codex (GPT-5.5) for an adversarial PASS/FAIL review, with an optional GLM-5.2 fallback. The producer is never the reviewer.

entries.title: agntux-calendly
entries.description: Track Calendly bookings, leads, and attendee status. Send cancellations and confirmations from AgntUX.

entries.title: epic
entries.description: Development orchestrator: a planner decomposes a large Epic into PR-sized, dependency-ordered tasks, and multiple runners autonomously implement them in parallel git worktrees, coordinating through a filesystem-backed state machine.

entries.title: theorems-harness
entries.description: Agent delivery surface for Theorems Harness capabilities, hooks, and MCP facade.

entries.title: wachines-skills
entries.description: Software factory toolkit for Claude Code: Postgres/Supabase & React/Next best practices, SQL-migration & security reviewers, docs architect, RPC-API contract, functional front QA, and the wachi-fabrica orchestrator — plus db/frontend/security subagents. Project-agnostic.

entries.title: loops-workflow
entries.description: 7 階段閉環開發工作流：dispatch 決策樹分流 → goal/explore/plan/build/verify/iterate，階段間 human gate，.loops/ markdown 記憶體，build 紅綠分離，verify 多 reviewer fan-out + validator 二輪。

entries.title: agntux-imessage
entries.description: See the iMessages that need a reply, and draft responses safely.

entries.title: delivery-metrics
entries.description: 在 AI 時代誠實衡量交付成效的 Claude Code 技能集。第一個技能 sprint-self-review 幫個人開發者用對 AI 免疫的流動/品質指標與判斷日誌，自評每個 sprint 的真實成效。

entries.title: alpaca-trading
entries.description: Connects Claude Code to Alpaca's Trading and Market Data APIs over OAuth-protected MCP.

entries.title: hephaestus
entries.description: Roman-named software-delivery team. One entry point (marcus) decomposes the goal, designs a named team, dispatches BA / dev / management / QA specialists, and synthesises the result. 22 sub-agents, hub-and-spoke.

entries.title: joomla
entries.description: Joomla 5+ / 6 / 7 extension development skill — components, modules, plugins, libraries, templates with modern MVC, PSR-4 namespaces, DI, and service providers.

entries.title: agntux-core
entries.description: Your AgntUX home base. Set up with /agntux onboard, then use /agntux triage every day to see your action items.

entries.title: agntux-notion
entries.description: Brings your Notion workspace into AgntUX, so tasks and updates show up in one place.

entries.title: staff-engineer
entries.description: Free squidcode skills: squidapp (scaffold a Next.js + NestJS/Prisma + Postgres app) + squidops (toolchain doctor), with squidup + squidupgrade.

entries.title: garmin-bud
entries.description: Talk to your Garmin Connect data — MCP server plus setup and fitness coach skills for Claude Code.

entries.title: nativeui
entries.description: Author native iOS + Android apps with NativeUI: generate plain HTML/CSS, import it to a NativeUI project, export native screens, and wire backend through the NuiBackend interface without touching generated UI.

entries.title: vue-options-api-best-practices
entries.description: Vue 3 Options API style (data(), methods, this context). Each reference shows Options API solution only.

entries.title: manifold3d-mcp
entries.description: MCP server + skill for designing 3D-printable models with manifold-3d. Validates LLM-generated TypeScript snippets and streams the result to a live three.js preview with STL/3MF export.

entries.title: vue-jsx-best-practices
entries.description: JSX syntax in Vue (e.g., class vs className, JSX plugin config).

entries.title: bkper-cli
entries.description: Adds Bkper CLI guidance for safe Bkper data, reporting, app development, and accounting-support workflows in Claude Code.

entries.title: create-adaptable-composable
entries.description: Create a library-grade Vue composable that accepts maybe-reactive inputs (MaybeRef / MaybeRefOrGetter) so callers can pass a plain value, ref, or getter. Normalize inputs with toValue()/toRef() inside reactive effects (watch/watchEffect) to keep behavior predictable and reactive. Use this skill when user asks for creating adaptable or reusable composables.

entries.title: deep-reviewer-seek
entries.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entries.title: video-recap-skills
entries.description: Turn any video into a Chinese-narration recap on ffmpeg + one Xiaomi MiMo API key: understanding (ASR + VLM) -> narration -> cut -> voiceover -> assemble. A bundle of independent skills + a thin orchestrator. Runs on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

entries.title: strategic-operator
entries.description: Engagement-manager-grade thought-partner and operator toolkit: finance-performance, risk-regulatory, strategy-building, gtm-commercial, operations-org, growth-transformation, fundraising-capital, market-intelligence, people-talent, exec-deliverables, and the shared house-style standard. Investor-grade, answer-first, with tested Python tools and consistency lints. Tuned for fintech, payments, banking, lending, and SaaS/cloud/AI across Europe, the GCC, and Africa.

entries.title: literature-trends
entries.description: Abductive argumentation-based trend analysis — trace hypothesis evolution across time windows in keyword-tagged paper clusters.

entries.title: agntux-gmail
entries.description: Brings your Gmail into AgntUX. Spots emails that need a reply and drafts responses you review and send yourself.

entries.title: agntux-asana
entries.description: Asana tasks and projects in your AgntUX knowledge store.

entries.title: bvd-sex-age-analysis
entries.description: Generate the standard BVD Sex and Age epidemiological PowerPoint slide deck from a DHIS2 Tracker line-list export (Ebola/MVE outbreak, DRC). Runs all reconciliation quality gates before producing the deck.

entries.title: one-click-improve
entries.description: Agent task harness for coding tasks: preflight the task, loop until done — scoped tasks, task memory, and surface-aware execution.
